reference_image.critical_note: The reference image IS the button. Match its style, palette, silhouette, and dimensions exactly.

normal.description: Use the source image directly as the normal state.

hover.description: Hover state: slightly brighter overall, subtle raised-highlight feel.

pressed.description: Pressed state: pushed in, top highlight flips to shadow, inner content shifts down 1-2px.

disabled.description: Disabled state: faded, desaturated, lower contrast.

forbidden_content: stripping or altering any backgrounds, frames, or borders that are visible in the source
additional UI elements not present in the source
text changes — preserve any text exactly as in the source
drop shadows or glows not present in the source
priority_rules: DIMENSIONS MUST match the reference image exactly — this is the highest priority constraint
SILHOUETTE (outer edge shape) MUST be identical across all states
The reference image defines the art style — match it exactly, do not improve or clean up
State modifications describe relative changes from the reference, not absolute values
When in doubt, err toward less modification — subtle state changes are better than dramatic ones
